name: Clawvisor Webhook
description: Receives Clawvisor action callbacks, verifies HMAC signatures, and routes results to the agent session.

path.description: HTTP path to listen on for Clawvisor callbacks. Default: /clawvisor/callback

gatewayWsUrl.description: Gateway WebSocket URL. Default: ws://127.0.0.1:18789. Override if binding to a different port or host.
